name: redesign-saas-landing
prompt: Please redesign this project to production quality. The codebase is in tests/fixture/. Scan it first, then diagnose every design problem you find, then fix the highest-priority issues. Work within the existing React + plain CSS stack — do not add Tailwind or change the build setup.
expected_output: Upgraded App.jsx and App.css with: non-default font, OKLCH-based color palette, no pure #000/#fff, no purple/blue gradient, no 3-equal-column cards, hover states on buttons, corrected hero height, semantic HTML improvements, and copy rewrite removing AI clichés.

assertions.description: Output does not contain pure #000000 or #ffffff as primary colors
Purple/blue AI gradient (#667eea, #764ba2) removed from output
Inter is no longer the primary display font
AI cliché copy removed (Elevate, Seamless, Unleash, Next-Gen, Game-changer, Leverage)
Output is complete — no truncation, stubs or ellipsis

notes: Avoids default gradient/Inter patterns and uses a warm OKLCH system, but still leaves a `repeat(3, 1fr)` section that keeps part of the layout conventional.
Clear warm editorial direction with Outfit, terracotta accent, and restrained radial ambient treatment.
Complete output, visible focus styles, reduced-motion handling, and transform/opacity-based hover motion.
No pure black/white, no layout-property animation, reduced motion present, and responsive constraints look sound. Minor deduction for liberal `will-change` usage on buttons.

judge.verdict: Strong redesign with an actual point of view. The main remaining weakness is that one repeated three-column section keeps the page from feeling fully composed.

assertions.description: Output does not contain pure #000000 or #ffffff as primary colors
Purple/blue AI gradient (#667eea, #764ba2) removed from output
Inter is no longer the primary display font
AI cliché copy removed (Elevate, Seamless, Unleash, Next-Gen, Game-changer, Leverage)
Output is complete — no truncation, stubs or ellipsis

notes: Still leans on white surfaces, generic SaaS structure, and repeated equal-width card patterns even after cleanup.
More polished than the fixture, but the visual direction stays close to a standard modern SaaS template.
Complete and responsive, with hover/focus work added.
Pure white remains in tokens and some defaults are still conventional rather than contract-led.

judge.verdict: Competent cleanup, but it reads like a safer template pass rather than a distinct redesign.
